label: KarooFireFly
description: Automatic ANT+ smart bike light control based on time of day and ambient light. Controls lights already paired through Karoo's native sensor settings — no separate pairing needed. Features independent time-based (sunrise/sunset) and ambient light sensor modes, configurable light profiles per zone (day/dusk/night), zone change notifications with sound, and manual override via BonusActions.
releaseNotes:
* Replace light control mode dropdown with independent feature switches
* Add zone change notifications with sound during rides
* Auto-save all settings immediately on change
* Show dawn/dusk zone start times next to offset sliders
* Improve settings layout with visual grouping and hierarchy
* Fix InRideAlert color crash in ride app
